description.ro: Invata C# de la zero! Acest curs acopera conceptele fundamentale ale limbajului, structuri de date si dezvoltare de aplicatii desktop. Imbunatateste-ti abilitatile de programare!
description.en: Learn C# from scratch! This course covers the fundamental concepts of the language, data structures, and desktop application development. Enhance your programming skills!

description.ro: Descopera C++ intr-un curs intensiv! Vom explora sintaxa limbajului, programarea orientata pe obiect si dezvoltarea de aplicatii performante. Incepe sa codezi cu incredere!
description.en: Discover C++ in an intensive course! We will explore the language's syntax, object-oriented programming, and the development of high-performance applications. Start coding with confidence!

description.ro: Exploreaza Java intr-un curs captivant! Iti vom arata cum sa dezvolti aplicatii robuste folosind acest limbaj popular. Acoperim sintaxa, structuri de date si programare orientata pe obiect.
description.en: Explore Java in an engaging course! We’ll show you how to develop robust applications using this popular language. We cover syntax, data structures, and object-oriented programming.

description.ro: Invata JavaScript si poti aduce la viata paginile web! Acest curs te va invata cum sa creezi interactiuni dinamice si sa dezvolti aplicatii web eficiente folosind cele mai noi tehnologii.
description.en: Learn JavaScript and bring web pages to life! This course will teach you how to create dynamic interactions and develop efficient web applications using the latest technologies.

description.ro: Stapaneste framework-ul Spring pentru dezvoltare Java! Acest curs te va ghida prin concepte de baza si avansate, inclusiv gestionarea dependentelor si dezvoltarea de aplicatii scalabile.
description.en: Master the Spring framework for Java development! This course will guide you through basic and advanced concepts, including dependency management and scalable application development.

description.ro: Incepe calatoria in web design cu HTML! In acest curs, vei invata sa creezi structuri de pagina, sa adaugi continut si sa folosesti etichete HTML pentru a crea site-uri web interactive. Iti poti crea chiar propriul BLOG!
description.en: Start your web design journey with HTML! In this course, you'll learn how to create page structures, add content, and use HTML tags to build interactive websites. You can even create your own BLOG!

description.ro: Imbunatateste aspectul paginilor tale web cu CSS! In acest curs vei invata sa stilizezi si sa aranjezi elementele HTML pentru a crea site-uri web atractive si responsive.
description.en: Enhance the appearance of your web pages with CSS! In this course, you will learn how to style and arrange HTML elements to create attractive and responsive websites.

description.ro: Invata PHP si dezvolta aplicatii web dinamice! Acest curs acopera sintaxa PHP, interactiunea cu bazele de date si crearea de functionalitati complexe pentru site-uri web.
description.en: Learn PHP and develop dynamic web applications! This course covers PHP syntax, database interactions, and creating complex functionalities for websites.

description.ro: Exploreaza Python, un limbaj versatil si accesibil! Acest curs acopera conceptele de baza, structuri de date si dezvoltarea de aplicatii. Ideal pentru incepatori.
description.en: Explore Python, a versatile and accessible language! This course covers basic concepts, data structures, and application development. Ideal for beginners.

description.ro: Invata R pentru analiza datelor! Acest curs te va invata cum sa prelucrezi si sa vizualizezi date, folosind pachete si tehnici avansate pentru statistici si analize.
description.en: Learn R for data analysis! This course will teach you how to process and visualize data using advanced packages and techniques for statistics and analysis.
